sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Eite in lo i kho a, Khaici pha i tuh hi;
Pasian in hong etsak a, Tui buakin khangsak
hi;
Phalbi daingo kaisak a, Khualum zong hong pia hi;
Huih nung in ni hong tang a, Guah in no
suaksak hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kim leh pam na hoihte, Pasian hong piak sa hi;
Topa phat un, Topa
phat un, Hong it lua hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na khempeuh a piangsak Pa, Amah bek a hi hi;
Lam gei-a pakte
zem a, Aksite tangsak hi;
Huih leh tui’n athu mang a, Vasate an vak hi;
Eite A ta i hi a, An
hong vakzaw hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Nong piak na hoihte hangin, Pa aw, kong phat uh hi;
Lo pawi, an lak
hunte in, Nuntak cidamna hi;
Nong itna thuhkik na’ng in, Bangmah dang om lo hi;
Hih hang
Nang deih lian pen in, Lungsim nuam khiatna hi.
